member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible for VerifyInstancesializing Prime data and (optionally) verifying all the test instances in the TP.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.BooleanType
member.summary: Enumerated type for Boolean value.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.BooleanType.True
member.summary: True/Enabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.BooleanType.False
member.summary: False/Disabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.EngineeringDebug
member.summary: Gets or sets EngineeringDebug mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.VerifyAll
member.summary: Gets or sets VerifyAll mode.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.ParallelVerifyEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets if executes the Verify all instances in parallel.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.ParallelVerifyThreadCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of threads to use for parallel verify.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.ParallelVerifyInstanceAffinity
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to a comma separated file with the thread affinity per test instance (thread index,instance name).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.SequentialTestClasses
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of test classes to verify sequentially.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.PrintPatternMemory
member.summary: Gets or sets pattern memory printing.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.PriorityInstanceVerify
member.summary: Gets or sets the list of instances that must be verified prior the verify all instances.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeInstancesTestMethod.PrimeInitController
member.summary: Gets or sets the prime init controller object.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics
member.summary: Holds the statistic data for all the test instances' Verify.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Initialize
member.summary: Initialize the test instance statistics for a new execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Finish
member.summary: Finishes the test instance statistics by doing the roll over and dumping of the data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry
member.summary: Holds the statistic data for the verify of a given test instance.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int64,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The name of the given test instance.
The class name for the given test instance.
The initial time of the verify of the given instance with respect to the beginning of the verify all instances.
The current verify all instance iteration.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the given instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry.ClassName
member.summary: Gets the class name of the given instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry.Module
member.summary: Gets the module of the given instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry.PrivateBytesBefore
member.summary: Gets the private bytes before the test instance's verify.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry.PrivateBytesAfter
member.summary: Gets the private bytes after the test instance's verify.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry.PrivateBytesDelta
member.summary: Gets the private bytes delta.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry.ElapsedTime
member.summary: Gets the elapsed time of the given test instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.TestInstanceStatistics.Entry.HasPassed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the verify of the given test instance passed.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible for initializing Prime data and (optionally) verifying all the test instances in the TP.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.BooleanType
member.summary: Enumerated type for Boolean value.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.BooleanType.True
member.summary: True/Enabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.BooleanType.False
member.summary: False/Disabled.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.GlobalPrimeTelemetryLogLevel
member.summary: Telemetry log level.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.GlobalPrimeTelemetryLogLevel.None
member.summary: Not used for writing log messages. Specifies that a logging category should not write any messages.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.GlobalPrimeTelemetryLogLevel.Debug
member.summary: Logs that contain the most detailed messages. These messages may contain sensitive application data. These messages are disabled by default and should never be enabled in a production environment.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.GlobalPrimeTelemetryLogLevel.Information
member.summary: Logs that track the general flow of the application. These logs should have long-term value.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.GlobalPrimeTelemetryLogLevel.Critical
member.summary: Logs that describe an unrecoverable application or system crash, or a catastrophic failure that requires immediate attention.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.PerformanceCounterLevel
member.summary: Performance Counter activity level.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.PerformanceCounterLevel.None
member.summary: Disable all counters.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.PerformanceCounterLevel.GlobalOnly
member.summary: Enable only global counters (TP level).

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.PerformanceCounterLevel.GlobalAndInstance
member.summary: Enable all counters (TP and Instance level).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.GlobalTelemetryLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the Performance telemetry level. Enum is defined in TestMethodBase.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.ForceFullInit
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to force full init and skip any 2nd init or InitOffline optimizations. When set to false (i.e. do not force full init), each test method will have the option to force it's own verify by overriding the default ForceReVerify API. This is a debug feature to allow modifying input files, for production TP this is expected to always be False.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.PerformanceCounterLogLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the Performance Counter level.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.TelemetryDebugInstances
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to a file with a list of test instance to set telemetry to debug.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.GlobalSettingsFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path to a file with Prime's global settings.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.PerformanceCounterSampleRate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Performance Counter level. 0 will ultimately disable the counters, N value will enable the counter on the Nth samples.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.PrimeInitController
member.summary: Gets or sets the prime init controller object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.ResolveTorchUserVars
member.summary: Resolve the issue where EOD clears the SCVars uservars triggering the TOS dirty bit mechanism causing full uservars evaluation. To overcome the issue special TORCH uservars collection will be created with location code and BOM group vars which Prime will update according to the values in SCVars collection.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.RegisterCallbacks
member.summary: Register Prime callbacks and create a flowEvent for post init flow.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeLibraryTestMethod.InitializePrimeInitControllerForOnline
member.summary: Routing the GSDS DB into Prime SharedStorage unless if ROUTE_GSDS_TO_PRIME=FALSE If the env variable not exist or not equals to FALSE then the default is GSDS on PRIME.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.InitializeLibrary.TelemetryMessages
member.summary: Initialize library telemetry messages.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.InitializeLibrary.TelemetryMessages.LogTestProgramMetaData(MPE.MIT.Logging.ILogger,System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Log kernel executed.
member.param: Meta data dictionary (InitSessionId, tpl, sptl, plist, env).

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph
member.summary: Aleph class.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.DefaultConfigurationFilesEnvVarName
member.summary: The environment variable name of the configuration files for Aleph init service's call.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.AlephTorchVar
member.summary: The environment variable name of the uservar containing dynamic Aleph file paths .

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.SchemaFilesEnvVarName
member.summary: The environment variable name of the Aleph schema files path.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.DateTimeFormat
member.summary: Time format for DateTimes converted to string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephCtorArgs,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.BinMatrixServiceNameDescriptor
member.summary: Gets or sets The name of the BinMatrixService as it has special treatment in the code. WIll be equal to "BinMatrixService" but UTs can override that value.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.Execute
member.summary: Executes Aleph.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.GetAllAlephServices
member.summary: Return all the IAlephAble services.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.RunServicesInit(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService})
member.summary: Run service init via GetConfigurationFilesInfo or GetAlephFilesRegEx (legacy).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.InitializeServiceByGetAlephFilesRegEx(Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex)
member.summary: Initializes the services with the GetAlephFilesRegEx (obsolete) call.
member.param: Regex as string from the service.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.Aleph.ShouldAlephInitService(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyCollection{System.String},Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}@)
member.summary: Checks if a service needs to be initialized with alephInit. This is done by comparing the found serviceFiles with the previous files the service parsed. If true out param contains the new files to keep track of.
member.param: If service needs aleph the new files and times are found here.

member.summary: Initializes the service with the result of GetConfigurationFilesInfo containing the Regex and the schema file for file check.
member.param: Collection of regex/schema files for the service.
Regex key to list of matched files.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephCtorArgs
member.summary: This class has no meaning - it is there to make Lizzard happy as it doesn't allow more than 5 arguments in c'tor.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephCtorArgs.ServicesConfigurationFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets The comma separated list of files for aleph.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephCtorArgs.ServicesToStoreFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets List of services to store the configuration files relative path at Shared Storage, for further ituff printing.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephCtorArgs.ExecuteSchemaValidation
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the json file schema validation is executed or not.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephCtorArgs.FileHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets FileHandler object for file IO operations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephCtorArgs.ForceAleph
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to disable the aleph optimization of skipping already parsed files.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephFile
member.summary: Holds the Aleph file path and timestamp.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephFile.FilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the aleph file path.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephFile.FileTimeStamp
member.summary: Gets or sets the aleph file time stamp.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService
member.summary: AlephService.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService.TheService
member.summary: Gets or sets theService.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService.ServiceName
member.summary: Gets or sets ServiceName.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService.AlreadyInitialized
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this service was already initialized once.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService.TrackedFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets Tracked files. Key -> File, Value -> Datetime.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephService.PassedAleph
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the service aleph actually worked.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephStoreServiceFilePaths
member.summary: Class to register a service configuration files into Shared Storage further Ituff printing.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephStoreServiceFilePaths.#ctor(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: List of services descriptors/names, separated by comma.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephStoreServiceFilePaths.StoreServiceFilesToSharedStorage
member.summary: Stores the service's files configuration data at the shared storage for further Ituff print.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephStoreServiceFilePaths.ServiceShouldBeStored(System.String)
member.summary: Returns if the service's file should be printed to ituff.
member.returns: True if the service is included in the printing list.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.AlephStoreServiceFilePaths.AddServiceFileInfo(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Adds the configuration file paths of a service to the printing list.
member.param: List of relative configuration file paths of the service.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.IO.FileHandler
member.summary: Main file handler implementation. For basic file IO operations.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.IO.IFileHandler
member.summary: File handling interfaces. Usage of FileService is preferred.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.IO.IFileHandler.ReadAll(System.String)
member.summary: Read all file contents and return it content as string.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator
member.summary: Class for handling schema validation of service's configuration json files.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator.schemaFilesPath
member.summary: The path to look for json schema files.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator.#ctor(Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.IO.IFileHandler,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator.ErrorList
member.summary: Gets or sets the error list from the schema validation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator.ValidateFiles(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Validates the files to the json schema file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator.ProcessFiles(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},NJsonSchema.JsonSchema)
member.summary: Validates files against a json schema file. Only files with json extension are processed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator.ValidateFile(NJsonSchema.JsonSchema,System.String)
member.summary: Executes the validation for a file with the json schema. Adds validation errors to a common list.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator.GetSchemaValidator(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a schema validation instance from a json schema file.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator.GetSchemaFileContent(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the content of a json schema file from the filesystem.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.JsonSchemaFileValidator.GetErrorDetails
member.summary: Gets all the validation errors detail as a string.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod
member.summary: Test method responsible for initializing Prime data and (optionally) verifying all the test instances in the TP.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.BooleanType
member.summary: Enumerated type for Boolean value.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.BooleanType.True
member.summary: True/Enabled.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.BooleanType.False
member.summary: False/Disabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.ForceValidateAlephFiles
member.summary: Gets or sets the value to enable/disable Json schema validation for service configuration files.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.ForceAleph
member.summary: Gets or sets the value to enable/disable aleph optimization to skip already parsed service configuration files. True disabled the optimization. False is default value with optimization on.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.Aleph
member.summary: Gets or sets Aleph instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.FileHandler
member.summary: Gets or sets the file handler for file IO operations.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.PrimeInitController
member.summary: Gets or sets the prime init controller object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.IsSchemaValidationEnabled
member.summary: Returns if the schema validation should be processed for the configuration files handled by Aleph. By default schema validation is disabled. But if IsSysCFileServiceUp = False (not a VPO or Production) the validation is enabled automatically. This is to avoid the user to be aware of enabling the validation for local/eng runs or forget to set to False the parameter in a production TP to save init time.
member.returns: True is schema validation for configuration files should be executed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.IsAlephFileSkipOptimizationDisabled
member.summary: Returns if the optimization that skips already parsed files is disabled. By default it is enabled.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.PrimeInitializeServicesTestMethod.InitializeAleph
member.summary: To support dynamic env name for aleph files per bom group. By default TorchRulesVar.AlephEnvVariableName is used to extract aleph files. If the uservar AlephEnvVariableName or uservar group TorchRulesVar is not exist, or the uservar is empty, then ALEPH_FILES is used.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics
member.summary: Holds the statistic data for all the services' Aleph.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Initialize(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initialize the service statistics for a new execution.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.CreateEntry(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new entry with the given service name.
member.param: The name of the service to add.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Finish
member.summary: Finishes the service statistics by doing the roll over and dumping of the data.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Entry
member.summary: Holds the statistic data for the verify of a given test service.

members.member:
Initializes a new instance of the class.
The name of the given service.Entry

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Entry.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the given service.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Entry.PrivateBytesBefore
member.summary: Gets the private bytes before the test service's verify.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Entry.PrivateBytesAfter
member.summary: Gets the private bytes after the test service's verify.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Entry.VirtualBytesBefore
member.summary: Gets the virtual bytes before the service's verify.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Entry.VirtualBytesAfter
member.summary: Gets the virtual bytes after the service's verify.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Entry.ElapsedTime
member.summary: Gets the elapsed time of the given test service.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.Initializers.ServiceStatistics.Entry.Close
member.summary: Closes this service's statistic.
